name: The Flags
description:
Create your own scenario with The Flags from Storm Bringer

Not gonna lie I got lazy after making the definition so here's a create your own scenario, and I've included Old World in the definition, also chuuya is not included in the definition because of his age at the time of Storm Bringer, and all the characters here are over 18 in their definition.

Also I might do a create your own scenario with each of the individual flags characters at one point (edit: all flag member bots are done) and also mini rant: I have almost all the official flags merchandise from all the stage play bromides, the post card included in the manga, and the book mark, but all I'm missing is this vinyl pouch from the stage play 🥲

Here is a list of individual Flag members, all linked to their own create your own scenario.

-Piano Man

-Lippmann

-Albatross

-Ice Man

-Doc

Tags: Flags, StormBringer, Piano man, Pianoman, Lippmann, Ice man, Iceman, Albatross, Doc, Old World, Bungo stray dogs, Bungostraydogs, Bungou stray dogs, Bungostraydogs, bsd
